info.title: QVeris Public REST API
info.summary: External REST API for enterprise integration.
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1 schema for the formally released public `/api/v1` REST API surface. It covers search, provider discovery, tool metadata lookup/execution, credits, and account audit endpoints. Unreleased API families are intentionally excluded from this customer-facing schema.

get.description:
获取账号中心结算历史轻量 feed。

This first implementation serves the immutable ledger summary path used
after readiness confirms the ledger is complete for the requested range.
查询当前用户的积分信息，包括各类积分明细和剩余总积分。支持 API Key 和 JWT 认证。

Query immutable final credit balance movements. Usage audit explains request outcomes; the credits ledger explains signed balance changes. Negative `amount_credits` values consume credits and positive values grant credits.

parameters.name: scope

schema.description: 预定义账本范围，例如 account_history
schema.title: Scope

parameters.description: 预定义账本范围，例如 account_history

example.message: Invalid direction. Use consume, grant, or any

get.description: Check whether this user's account history can safely switch to credits_ledger.
导出用户 credits ledger 账本，供账号中心和运营审计使用。
获取单条 credits ledger detail，用于账单详情展开和审计追溯。

Return the total credits spent by the current user in the given date range.

Uses a single server-side SUM query — no pagination limit — so results are
accurate even for high-volume users with thousands of events in the window.

Query canonical usage events to confirm request success, failure, and final charge outcome. Agent, CLI, and MCP clients should prefer precise filters such as `execution_id` or `summary=true` with a bounded `limit` instead of dumping full history.

example.message: Invalid start_date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD or ISO-8601 datetime

get.description: 导出 request-level usage audit，供用户与支持审计使用。
获取轻量 usage events summary，用于账号页列表快速渲染。
获取单条 usage event 详情。

post.description: Find ranked capabilities from a natural-language query. Discover is free. Results may include `expected_cost` and `billing_rule` so clients can estimate a later Call.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch seconds when the current rate-limit window resets.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry after a rate-limit response.

post.description: Fetch full capability metadata for one or more tool ids. Inspect is free and returns the same capability shape as Discover, including parameter schema, examples, quality signals, and cost estimates.

post.description: Execute a selected capability. Call may consume credits according to the capability `billing_rule`; the response can include a pre-settlement `billing` statement, while final settlement is available through usage audit and credits ledger endpoints.

example.error_message: Missing required parameter: tool_id. Provide it as query (?tool_id=xxx) or in JSON body.

limit.description: Maximum number of ranked results to return.

session_id.description: Optional tracking and pricing-context identifier. It does not promise a cache hit.

search_id.description: Search id that returned these capabilities, when available.

session_id.description: Optional tracking and pricing-context identifier. It does not promise a cache hit.

tool_id.description: Capability id. Optional when supplied as the `tool_id` query parameter.

search_id.description: Search id that returned the selected capability.

session_id.description: Optional tracking and pricing-context identifier. If omitted, the service may use the execution id.

parameters.description: Capability-specific parameters validated by the selected tool schema.

max_response_size.description: Maximum response payload bytes before truncation. Use -1 for no limit.

PublicBillingRule.title: PublicBillingRule
PublicBillingRule.description: Capability billing rule used for pre-call estimation. Final settlement is reflected in usage audit and credits ledger endpoints.

expected_cost.description: Pre-call cost estimate returned by Discover/Inspect when available.

cost.description: Legacy cost estimate. Prefer `expected_cost` and `billing_rule` for pre-call display.
